attributes.title: DNS Activity — Visibility
attributes.visState:
{"title": "DNS Activity — Visibility", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### 🌐 DNS Activity (all queries) — visibility
**Open:** [Discover](/app/discover) · [Wazuh app](/app/wazuh) — and see the **DNS Threat Monitoring** dashboard for the flagged subset.

The **full DNS firehose** from Sysmon Event 22 (every query; archive-only, level 0) — high volume. Reads the **`wazuh-archives-*`** index pattern.

**Query status:** `0` = success · `9003` = name doesn't exist (NXDOMAIN) · `9002` = server failure · `9501` = no records of that type · `123`/`9701` = other DNS errors. The **failed-lookup** panels surface non-zero statuses (DGA / dead-C2 / typos / misconfig).

💡 Make hosts clickable: add a URL field-formatter to `agent.id`. NB this dashboard targets `wazuh-archives-*` — if importing elsewhere, remap it to your archives index pattern."}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Total queries
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Total queries", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Queries"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 100000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 40}}}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Distinct domains
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Distinct domains", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "data.win.eventdata.queryName", "customLabel": "Domains"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 100000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 40}}}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Hosts
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Hosts", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "agent.name", "customLabel": "Hosts"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 100000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 40}}}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Failed lookups
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Failed lookups", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Failed lookups"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 100000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 40}}}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Query volume over time
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Query volume over time", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "timestamp", "timeRange": {"from": "now-7d", "to": "now"}, "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity — Top queried domains
attributes.visState: {"title": "DNS Activity \u2014 Top queried domains", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "data.win.eventdata.queryName", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 50, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: DNS Activity (all queries)
attributes.description: All DNS queries from Sysmon Event 22 (wazuh-archives-*): volume, top domains/hosts/processes/resolved IPs, and failed lookups (NXDOMAIN etc.).
